chunks.text: MAK/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. S-1216 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Hearing of Case. 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 17.11.2025. Mr. Irfan Gul Memon, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Ali Zardari, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. Inspector Rafique Soomro, Focal Person SSP Sujawal and SHO Muneer Ahmed, PS Jatti. ------------------------------------ Learned counsel for the petitioner through instant petition seeks following relief:- 1. To grant protection for the life(s) of petitioner and her husband namely Muhammad Uzaif. 2. Or another relief (s) which may this Hon’ble Court may deem fit & proper in favour of petitioner and her husband. Pursuant to court notices official respondents have filed their comments, which are taken on record, wherein it is undertaken that due protection shall be provided to the petitioners. Learned AAG and DPG also undertake that since the petitioners have contracted marriage of their own free will, without any inducement or coercion from anyone, the police shall provide due protection to the petitioners as and when required. Learned counsel for the petitioners state that he would be satisfied if, in terms of the statement made by the official respondents and the undertaking furnished by the AAG and DPG, this petition is disposed of. Order accordingly. The instant petition disposed of in the above terms. A copy of this order shall be sent to SSP District East for compliance. JUDGE
